collections.label: Award Separator
collections.tooltip: Please select your desired Separator style from the respective Attributes section, which will allow you to enable this Separator.

template_variables.label: Collection Section
template_variables.tooltip: This number determines where this collection appears in the Plex Collections page. Lower numbers/characters based on ascii are placed earlier.

template_variables.label: Sort Prefix
template_variables.tooltip: Override the prefix prepended to generated sort titles for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default.

template_variables.label: Sort Title
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated Plex sort title format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Name Format
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated collection name format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Summary Format
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated collection summary format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Title Format
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated dynamic collection title format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Use Year Collections
template_variables.tooltip: Leave enabled to create the individual year collections for this award default. Turn it off to keep only the main award collections.

template_variables.label: Data Starting
template_variables.tooltip: Determines the starting year of the event to use to create collections. Allowed values: number greater than 0, first, latest, relative first (first+#), or relative latest (latest-#).

template_variables.label: Data Ending
template_variables.tooltip: Determines the ending year of the event to use to create collections. Allowed values: number greater than 0, first, latest, relative first (first+#), or relative latest (latest-#).

template_variables.label: Data Increment
template_variables.tooltip: Determines the amount incremented from one collection to the other. Allowed values: number greater than 0.

template_variables.label: Exclude
template_variables.tooltip: Exclude specific years from these collections.

template_variables.label: Use All Child Collections
template_variables.tooltip: Set the default on/off state for all child collections in this Defaults File. Individual child toggles override this setting: if Use All is on and a specific child is off, that child stays off; if Use All is off and a specific child is on, that child stays on.

template_variables.label: Oscars Best Picture Winners
template_variables.tooltip: Collection of Oscars Best Picture Award Winners.

template_variables.label: Oscars Best Picture Winners Name
template_variables.tooltip: Override the collection name for the Oscars Best Picture Winners collection. Leave blank to inherit the family Name Format value.

template_variables.label: Oscars Best Picture Winners Summary
template_variables.tooltip: Override the collection summary for the Oscars Best Picture Winners collection. Leave blank to inherit the family Summary Format value.

template_variables.label: Add missing items to Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:
Add missing items to Radarr can generate a lot of internet traffic and disk space issues depending on the number of items missing in your library.
Use with caution.

template_variables.label: Oscars Best Director Winners
template_variables.tooltip: Collection of Oscars Best Director Award Winners.

template_variables.label: Oscars Best Director Winners Name
template_variables.tooltip: Override the collection name for the Oscars Best Director Winners collection. Leave blank to inherit the family Name Format value.

template_variables.label: Oscars Best Director Winners Summary
template_variables.tooltip: Override the collection summary for the Oscars Best Director Winners collection. Leave blank to inherit the family Summary Format value.

template_variables.label: Add missing items to Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:
Add missing items to Radarr can generate a lot of internet traffic and disk space issues depending on the number of items missing in your library.
Use with caution.

template_variables.label: Minimum Items
template_variables.tooltip:
Changes the minimum_items for all collections in a Defaults File.

Allowed values: number greater than 0.

template_variables.label: Ignore IDs
template_variables.tooltip:
Set a list of numeric IDs to ignore in this Defaults File.

Each entry must be a number like 603 or 1399.

template_variables.label: Ignore IMDb IDs
template_variables.tooltip:
Set a list of IMDb IDs to ignore in this Defaults File.

Each entry must look like tt1234567. Plex lookup is advisory and only checks the active library.

template_variables.label: Add missing items to Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:
Override Radarr add_missing for all collections in this Defaults File.

Add missing items to Radarr can generate a lot of internet traffic and disk space issues depending on the number of items missing in your library.
Use with caution.

template_variables.label: Search media when added to Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:
Override Radarr search for all collections in this Defaults File.

Automatically searches for media when added.

template_variables.label: Monitor media when added to Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:
Override Radarr monitor for all collections in this Defaults File.

Enables monitoring of newly added media in Radarr.

template_variables.label: Set existing media from collections to monitored in Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:
Override Radarr monitor_existing for all collections in this Defaults File.

Changes all existing media from collections to 'monitored' in Radarr.

template_variables.label: Radarr Tag
template_variables.tooltip:
Override the Radarr tag for all collections in this Defaults File.

Add one tag at a time.

template_variables.label: Item Radarr Tag
template_variables.tooltip:
Append a Radarr tag to every movie found by all collections in this Defaults File.

Add one tag at a time.

template_variables.label: Radarr Root Folder
template_variables.tooltip: Override Radarr root_folder_path for all collections in this Defaults File.

template_variables.label: Upgrade existing media in Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:
Override Radarr upgrade_existing for all collections in this Defaults File.

Upgrades existing media from collections to the current Radarr quality profile.

template_variables.label: Sync Mode
template_variables.tooltip:
Changes the sync_mode for all collections in a Defaults File.

Default is Sync

template_variables.label: Cache Builders
template_variables.tooltip:
Changes the Builder Cache for all collections in a Defaults File.

Allowed values: number 0 or greater.

template_variables.label: Collection Mode
template_variables.tooltip:
Controls the collection mode of all collections in a Defaults File.

Default is Library Default

template_variables.label: Collection Order
template_variables.tooltip:
Changes the Collection Order for all collections in a Defaults File.

Default is Custom (sorted in a custom order)

template_variables.label: Collection Section
template_variables.tooltip: This number determines where this collection appears in the Plex Collections page. Lower numbers/characters based on ascii are placed earlier.

template_variables.label: Sort Prefix
template_variables.tooltip: Override the prefix prepended to generated sort titles for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default.

template_variables.label: Sort Title
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated Plex sort title format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Name Format
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated collection name format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Summary Format
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated collection summary format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Title Format
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated dynamic collection title format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Use Year Collections
template_variables.tooltip: Leave enabled to create the individual year collections for this award default. Turn it off to keep only the main award collections.

template_variables.label: Data Starting
template_variables.tooltip: Determines the starting year of the event to use to create collections. Allowed values: number greater than 0, first, latest, relative first (first+#), or relative latest (latest-#).

template_variables.label: Data Ending
template_variables.tooltip: Determines the ending year of the event to use to create collections. Allowed values: number greater than 0, first, latest, relative first (first+#), or relative latest (latest-#).

template_variables.label: Data Increment
template_variables.tooltip: Determines the amount incremented from one collection to the other. Allowed values: number greater than 0.

template_variables.label: Exclude
template_variables.tooltip: Exclude specific years from these collections.

template_variables.label: Use All Child Collections
template_variables.tooltip: Set the default on/off state for all child collections in this Defaults File. Individual child toggles override this setting: if Use All is on and a specific child is off, that child stays off; if Use All is off and a specific child is on, that child stays on.

template_variables.label: Independent Spirit Best Feature Winners
template_variables.tooltip: Collection of Independent Spirit Best Feature Award Winners.

template_variables.label: Independent Spirit Best Feature Winners Name
template_variables.tooltip: Override the collection name for the Independent Spirit Best Feature Winners collection. Leave blank to inherit the family Name Format value.

template_variables.label: Independent Spirit Best Feature Winners Summary
template_variables.tooltip: Override the collection summary for the Independent Spirit Best Feature Winners collection. Leave blank to inherit the family Summary Format value.

template_variables.label: Add missing items to Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:
Add missing items to Radarr can generate a lot of internet traffic and disk space issues depending on the number of items missing in your library.
Use with caution.

template_variables.label: Minimum Items
template_variables.tooltip:
Changes the minimum_items for all collections in a Defaults File.

Allowed values: number greater than 0.

template_variables.label: Ignore IDs
template_variables.tooltip:
Set a list of numeric IDs to ignore in this Defaults File.

Each entry must be a number like 603 or 1399.

template_variables.label: Ignore IMDb IDs
template_variables.tooltip:
Set a list of IMDb IDs to ignore in this Defaults File.

Each entry must look like tt1234567. Plex lookup is advisory and only checks the active library.

template_variables.label: Add missing items to Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:
Override Radarr add_missing for all collections in this Defaults File.

Add missing items to Radarr can generate a lot of internet traffic and disk space issues depending on the number of items missing in your library.
Use with caution.

template_variables.label: Search media when added to Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:

template_variables.label: Monitor media when added to Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:

template_variables.tooltip:
Override Radarr monitor_existing for all collections in this Defaults File.

template_variables.tooltip:
Override the Radarr tag for all collections in this Defaults File.

Add one tag at a time.

template_variables.label: Item Radarr Tag
template_variables.tooltip:
Append a Radarr tag to every movie found by all collections in this Defaults File.

Add one tag at a time.

template_variables.label: Radarr Root Folder
template_variables.tooltip: Override Radarr root_folder_path for all collections in this Defaults File.

template_variables.label: Upgrade existing media in Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:

template_variables.label: Sort Title
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated Plex sort title format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Name Format
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated collection name format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Summary Format
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated collection summary format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: List Days
template_variables.tooltip: Changes the list_days attribute of the Builder for all collections in this Defaults File. Valid values are numbers greater than 0.

template_variables.label: List Size
template_variables.tooltip: Changes the list_size attribute of the Builder for all collections in this Defaults File. Valid values are numbers greater than 0.

template_variables.label: Use All Child Collections
template_variables.tooltip: Set the default on/off state for all child collections in this Defaults File. Individual child toggles override this setting: if Use All is on and a specific child is off, that child stays off; if Use All is off and a specific child is on, that child stays on.

template_variables.label: Plex Popular
template_variables.tooltip: Enable the most Popular Movies/Shows on Plex

template_variables.label: Plex Popular Name
template_variables.tooltip: Override the collection name for the Plex Popular collection. Leave blank to inherit the family Name Format value.

template_variables.label: Plex Popular Summary
template_variables.tooltip: Override the collection summary for the Plex Popular collection. Leave blank to inherit the family Summary Format value.

template_variables.label: Plex Popular List Days
template_variables.tooltip: Changes the list_days attribute of the Plex Popular collection. Valid values are numbers greater than 0. Leave blank to inherit the family List Days value.

template_variables.label: Plex Popular List Size
template_variables.tooltip: Changes the list_size attribute of the Plex Popular collection. Valid values are numbers greater than 0. Leave blank to inherit the family List Size value.

template_variables.label: Plex Watched
template_variables.tooltip: Enable the most Watched Movies/Shows on Plex

template_variables.label: Plex Watched Name
template_variables.tooltip: Override the collection name for the Plex Watched collection. Leave blank to inherit the family Name Format value.

template_variables.label: Plex Watched Summary
template_variables.tooltip: Override the collection summary for the Plex Watched collection. Leave blank to inherit the family Summary Format value.

template_variables.label: Plex Watched List Days
template_variables.tooltip: Changes the list_days attribute of the Plex Watched collection. Valid values are numbers greater than 0. Leave blank to inherit the family List Days value.

template_variables.label: Plex Watched List Size
template_variables.tooltip: Changes the list_size attribute of the Plex Watched collection. Valid values are numbers greater than 0. Leave blank to inherit the family List Size value.

template_variables.label: Style
template_variables.tooltip: Controls the visual theme of the collections created.

template_variables.label: Minimum Items
template_variables.tooltip:
Changes the minimum_items for all collections in a Defaults File.

Allowed values: number greater than 0.

template_variables.label: Ignore IDs
template_variables.tooltip:
Set a list of numeric IDs to ignore in this Defaults File.

Each entry must be a number like 603 or 1399.

template_variables.label: Ignore IMDb IDs
template_variables.tooltip:
Set a list of IMDb IDs to ignore in this Defaults File.

Each entry must look like tt1234567. Plex lookup is advisory and only checks the active library.

template_variables.label: Item Radarr Tag
template_variables.tooltip:
Append a Radarr tag to every movie found by all collections in this Defaults File.

Add one tag at a time.

template_variables.label: Item Sonarr Tag
template_variables.tooltip:
Append a Sonarr tag to every series found by all collections in this Defaults File.

Add one tag at a time.

template_variables.label: Sync Mode
template_variables.tooltip:
Changes the sync_mode for all collections in a Defaults File.

Default is Sync

template_variables.label: Cache Builders
template_variables.tooltip:
Changes the Builder Cache for all collections in a Defaults File.

Allowed values: number 0 or greater.

template_variables.label: Collection Mode
template_variables.tooltip:
Controls the collection mode of all collections in a Defaults File.

Default is Library Default

template_variables.label: Style
template_variables.tooltip: Controls the visual theme of the collections created.

template_variables.label: Minimum Items
template_variables.tooltip:
Changes the minimum_items for all collections in a Defaults File.

Allowed values: number greater than 0.

template_variables.label: Ignore IDs
template_variables.tooltip:
Set a list of numeric IDs to ignore in this Defaults File.

Each entry must be a number like 603 or 1399.

template_variables.label: Ignore IMDb IDs
template_variables.tooltip:
Set a list of IMDb IDs to ignore in this Defaults File.

Each entry must look like tt1234567. Plex lookup is advisory and only checks the active library.

template_variables.label: Add missing items to Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:
Override Radarr add_missing for all collections in this Defaults File.

Add missing items to Radarr can generate a lot of internet traffic and disk space issues depending on the number of items missing in your library.
Use with caution.

template_variables.label: Search media when added to Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:
Override Radarr search for all collections in this Defaults File.

Automatically searches for media when added.

template_variables.label: Monitor media when added to Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:
Override Radarr monitor for all collections in this Defaults File.

Enables monitoring of newly added media in Radarr.

template_variables.label: Set existing media from collections to monitored in Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:
Override Radarr monitor_existing for all collections in this Defaults File.

Changes all existing media from collections to 'monitored' in Radarr.

template_variables.label: Radarr Tag
template_variables.tooltip:
Override the Radarr tag for all collections in this Defaults File.

Add one tag at a time.

template_variables.label: Item Radarr Tag
template_variables.tooltip:
Append a Radarr tag to every movie found by all collections in this Defaults File.

Add one tag at a time.

template_variables.label: Radarr Root Folder
template_variables.tooltip: Override Radarr root_folder_path for all collections in this Defaults File.

template_variables.label: Upgrade existing media in Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:
Override Radarr upgrade_existing for all collections in this Defaults File.

Upgrades existing media from collections to the current Radarr quality profile.

template_variables.label: Sync Mode
template_variables.tooltip:
Changes the sync_mode for all collections in a Defaults File.

Default is Sync

template_variables.label: Cache Builders
template_variables.tooltip:
Changes the Builder Cache for all collections in a Defaults File.

Allowed values: number 0 or greater.

template_variables.label: Collection Mode
template_variables.tooltip:
Controls the collection mode of all collections in a Defaults File.

Default is Library Default

Default is Custom (sorted in a custom order)

template_variables.label: Collection Section
template_variables.tooltip: This number determines where this collection appears in the Plex Collections page. Lower numbers/characters based on ascii are placed earlier.

template_variables.label: Sort Prefix
template_variables.tooltip: Override the prefix prepended to generated sort titles for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default.

template_variables.label: Sort Title
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated Plex sort title format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Name Format
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated collection name format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Summary Format
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated collection summary format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Limit
template_variables.tooltip: Changes the Builder Limit for all collections in this Defaults File. Valid values are numbers greater than 0.

template_variables.label: Use All Child Collections
template_variables.tooltip: Set the default on/off state for all child collections in this Defaults File. Individual child toggles override this setting: if Use All is on and a specific child is off, that child stays off; if Use All is off and a specific child is on, that child stays on.

Controls the collection mode of all collections in a Defaults File.

Default is Library Default

options.label: Show this Collection and its Items

template_variables.label: Visible Home
template_variables.tooltip: Changes collection visible on Home Tab (Only works with Plex Pass)

template_variables.label: Visible Library
template_variables.tooltip: Changes collection visible on Library Recommended Tab (Only works with Plex Pass)

template_variables.label: Visible Shared
template_variables.tooltip: Changes collection visible on Shared Users' Home Tab (Only works with Plex Pass)

template_variables.label: Sort By
template_variables.tooltip:
Changes the Smart Filter Sort for all collections in a Defaults File.

Default is Release Date (Originally Available) Descending

template_variables.label: Item Radarr Tag
template_variables.tooltip:
Append a Radarr tag to every movie found by all collections in this Defaults File.

Add one tag at a time.

collections.label: Producers
collections.tooltip: This may be a resource-intensive file as Kometa has to calculate how often each person appears in your library.

template_variables.label: Collection Section
template_variables.tooltip: This number determines where this collection appears in the Plex Collections page. Lower numbers/characters based on ascii are placed earlier.

template_variables.label: Sort Prefix
template_variables.tooltip: Override the prefix prepended to generated sort titles for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default.

template_variables.label: Sort Title
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated Plex sort title format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Name Format
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated collection name format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Summary Format
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated collection summary format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Title Format
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated dynamic collection title format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Use Separator
template_variables.tooltip: Create a separator collection before this set of collections.

template_variables.label: Style
template_variables.tooltip: Controls the visual theme of the collections created.

template_variables.label: Data Depth
template_variables.tooltip: Replaces the data dynamic collection value. Controls the depth within the casting credits to search for common actors.

template_variables.label: Data Limit
template_variables.tooltip: Replaces the data dynamic collection value. Controls the maximum number of collections to create.

template_variables.label: TMDb Birthday
template_variables.tooltip: Controls whether these TMDb person collections only run around a person's birthday. Enter a JSON-style object with any combination of this_month, before, and after. Examples: {"this_month": true}, {"before": 7}, or {"before": 7, "after": 7}.

template_variables.label: Include
template_variables.tooltip: Only create collections for these people. Kometa code allows this with Exclude, but the wiki says not to combine them.

template_variables.label: Exclude
template_variables.tooltip: Exclude specific people from these collections. Kometa code allows this with Include, but the wiki says not to combine them.

template_variables.label: Minimum Items
template_variables.tooltip:
Changes the minimum_items for all collections in a Defaults File.

Allowed values: number greater than 0.

template_variables.label: Ignore IDs
template_variables.tooltip:
Set a list of numeric IDs to ignore in this Defaults File.

Each entry must be a number like 603 or 1399.

template_variables.label: Ignore IMDb IDs
template_variables.tooltip:
Set a list of IMDb IDs to ignore in this Defaults File.

Each entry must look like tt1234567. Plex lookup is advisory and only checks the active library.

collections.label: Streaming
collections.tooltip: This will show content currently streaming on a particular service, not content that is exclusive to said service. Read the wiki for using originalsonly to change this

template_variables.label: Collection Section
template_variables.tooltip: This number determines where this collection appears in the Plex Collections page. Lower numbers/characters based on ascii are placed earlier.

template_variables.label: Sort Prefix
template_variables.tooltip: Override the prefix prepended to generated sort titles for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default.

template_variables.label: Sort Title
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated Plex sort title format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Name Format
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated collection name format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Summary Format
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated collection summary format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Title Format
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated dynamic collection title format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Limit
template_variables.tooltip: Changes the Builder Limit for all collections in this Defaults File. Valid values are numbers greater than 0.

template_variables.label: Discover Limit
template_variables.tooltip: Changes the TMDb Discover limit used for the streaming availability builder. Use 0 to keep the defaults file behavior.

template_variables.label: Use All Child Collections
template_variables.tooltip: Set the default on/off state for all child collections in this Defaults File. Individual child toggles override this setting: if Use All is on and a specific child is off, that child stays off; if Use All is off and a specific child is on, that child stays on.

template_variables.label: Use Separator
template_variables.tooltip: Create a separator collection before this set of collections.

template_variables.label: Originals Only
template_variables.tooltip: Switches supported services from "currently streaming on this service" to that service's original productions. This cannot be combined with Region and only works for select services such as Amazon, Apple TV, Disney, Max, Hulu, Netflix, Paramount, Peacock.

template_variables.label: Region
template_variables.tooltip: Optional ISO 3166-1 country code used for streaming availability, such as US, CA, GB, or ES. Leave blank to use the default provider region. Do not combine this with Originals Only.

template_variables.label: Exclude
template_variables.tooltip: Exclude specific seasonal collections from these collections.

template_variables.label: Minimum Items
template_variables.tooltip:
Changes the minimum_items for all collections in a Defaults File.

Allowed values: number greater than 0.

template_variables.label: Ignore IDs
template_variables.tooltip:
Set a list of numeric IDs to ignore in this Defaults File.

Each entry must be a number like 603 or 1399.

template_variables.label: Ignore IMDb IDs
template_variables.tooltip:
Set a list of IMDb IDs to ignore in this Defaults File.

Each entry must look like tt1234567. Plex lookup is advisory and only checks the active library.

template_variables.label: Add missing items to Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:
Override Radarr add_missing for all collections in this Defaults File.

Add missing items to Radarr can generate a lot of internet traffic and disk space issues depending on the number of items missing in your library.
Use with caution.

template_variables.label: Search media when added to Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:
Override Radarr search for all collections in this Defaults File.

Automatically searches for media when added.

template_variables.label: Monitor media when added to Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:
Override Radarr monitor for all collections in this Defaults File.

Enables monitoring of newly added media in Radarr.

template_variables.label: Set existing media from collections to monitored in Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:
Override Radarr monitor_existing for all collections in this Defaults File.

Changes all existing media from collections to 'monitored' in Radarr.

template_variables.label: Radarr Tag
template_variables.tooltip:
Override the Radarr tag for all collections in this Defaults File.

Add one tag at a time.

template_variables.label: Item Radarr Tag
template_variables.tooltip:
Append a Radarr tag to every movie found by all collections in this Defaults File.

Add one tag at a time.

template_variables.label: Radarr Root Folder
template_variables.tooltip: Override Radarr root_folder_path for all collections in this Defaults File.

template_variables.label: Upgrade existing media in Radarr
template_variables.tooltip:
Override Radarr upgrade_existing for all collections in this Defaults File.

Upgrades existing media from collections to the current Radarr quality profile.

template_variables.label: Sync Mode
template_variables.tooltip:
Changes the sync_mode for all collections in a Defaults File.

Default is Sync

template_variables.label: Cache Builders
template_variables.tooltip:
Changes the Builder Cache for all collections in a Defaults File.

Allowed values: number 0 or greater.

template_variables.label: Collection Mode
template_variables.tooltip:
Controls the collection mode of all collections in a Defaults File.

Default is Library Default

template_variables.label: Sort By
template_variables.tooltip:
Changes the Smart Filter Sort for all collections in a Defaults File.

Default is Release Date (Originally Available) Descending

template_variables.label: Collection Section
template_variables.tooltip: This number determines where this collection appears in the Plex Collections page. Lower numbers/characters based on ascii are placed earlier.

template_variables.label: Sort Prefix
template_variables.tooltip: Override the prefix prepended to generated sort titles for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default.

template_variables.label: Sort Title
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated Plex sort title format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Name Format
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated collection name format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Summary Format
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated collection summary format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Title Format
template_variables.tooltip: Override the generated dynamic collection title format for this Defaults File. Leave blank to inherit the Kometa default behavior.

template_variables.label: Limit
template_variables.tooltip: Changes the Builder Limit for all collections in this Defaults File. Valid values are numbers greater than 0.

template_variables.label: Use Separator
template_variables.tooltip: Create a separator collection before this set of collections.

template_variables.label: Data Starting
template_variables.tooltip: Controls the starting year for collections. Allowed values: number greater than 0, current_year, or a relative value like current_year-5.

template_variables.label: Data Ending
template_variables.tooltip: Controls the ending year for collections. Allowed values: number greater than 1, current_year, or a relative value like current_year-5.

template_variables.label: Data Increment
template_variables.tooltip: Controls the increment (i.e. every 5th year). Allowed values: number greater than 0.

template_variables.label: Exclude
template_variables.tooltip: Exclude specific years from these collections.

template_variables.label: Minimum Items
template_variables.tooltip:
Changes the minimum_items for all collections in a Defaults File.

Allowed values: number greater than 0.

template_variables.label: Ignore IDs
template_variables.tooltip:
Set a list of numeric IDs to ignore in this Defaults File.

Each entry must be a number like 603 or 1399.

template_variables.label: Ignore IMDb IDs
template_variables.tooltip:
Set a list of IMDb IDs to ignore in this Defaults File.

Each entry must look like tt1234567. Plex lookup is advisory and only checks the active library.

template_variables.label: Collection Mode
template_variables.tooltip:
Controls the collection mode of all collections in a Defaults File.

Default is Library Default
